lastReleaseMessage: v0.13.0: Plaid Phase 2 webhook relay (Cloudflare Worker, metadata-only per D-010) + scheduled localhost drain; SQLCipher at-rest (Wave 6) keyed from OS keystore; D-008..D-012 promoted into DECISIONS.md.

barRaise.topFinding: The eleven-cycle non-commit stall is over: on 2026-06-08 the tree shipped three MINORs in one day (v0.11.0 insights, v0.12.0 security hardening, v0.13.0 Plaid Phase 2 + SQLCipher), added .gitattributes, dropped the loop probe and .bak files, and left HEAD clean at 310ef64, closing both prior HIGH findings and most of the 06-08 action list. The cost of moving that fast is a cleanup tail: the project inverted three of its own 'what this is not' lines (no Plaid, not cloud-hosted, manual-upload-only) without updating CLAUDE.md, took on keytar (an archived native module) as the load-bearing key store for encrypted installs, and now carries a SQLCipher path that loses every transaction if the OS-keystore key is ever lost, with no documented escrow. None of it is bleeding today, but six MEDIUM findings cluster around doc, dependency, and scope hygiene. The verdict moves two tiers from at-risk to needs-attention; the work now is to reconcile the canonical framing to the Plaid/cloud reality and de-risk the encryption-key story before encryption is turned on for real.
